description: TypeScript-specific presets and configurations for GitHub Copilot

presets_to_add.label: React + Vite + TypeScript
presets_to_add.value:
- Frontend: React 19 + Vite + TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- State: React hooks — no Redux or Zustand

presets_to_add.label: Next.js full-stack
presets_to_add.value:
- Framework: Next.js 15 App Router
- Language: TypeScript strict mode
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- DB: Prisma + PostgreSQL

presets_to_add.label: Node.js + Express
presets_to_add.value:
- Backend: Node.js 20+ + Express
- Language: TypeScript strict mode
- Validation: Zod or Joi
- Testing: Jest

presets_to_add.label: TypeScript strict mode
presets_to_add.value:
- Use TypeScript strict mode. Prefer explicit types at all public API boundaries.
- Never use `any` — use `unknown` and narrow with type guards.
- Use named exports exclusively. Avoid default exports.
- Use async/await throughout. Never use .then() chains or callbacks.

presets_to_add.label: No `any` types
presets_to_add.description: Use `unknown` and narrow with type guards
presets_to_add.value: - Never use `any` — use `unknown` and narrow with type guards.

presets_to_add.label: Named exports only
presets_to_add.description: Avoid default exports for better refactoring
presets_to_add.value: - Use named exports exclusively. Avoid default exports.

presets_to_add.label: Async/await only
presets_to_add.value: - Use async/await throughout. Never use .then() chains or callbacks.
